label: Mar 31 — WTI selloff, sustained dislocation
description: March 31 saw a significant WTI move from ~105 down to ~99.6. Kalshi's market price persistently diverged from Black-Scholes fair value throughout the move, with the gap reaching 40+ cents at peak.

label: Mar 31 AM — Early session, high dislocation
description: Early March 31 session. CL near 102–103 with Kalshi consistently rich relative to fair value.

label: Apr 1 — Live session data
description: April 1 trading session. CL trading near the 100 strike, creating interesting near-the-money dislocation dynamics.
